verdict_reasoning: DSG4 is a desmosomal cadherin (HGNC gene-group membership), a classical single-pass transmembrane protein with a substantial extracellular domain mediating cell-cell adhesion in epithelial desmosomes. The NCBI summary explicitly identifies it as 'a transmembrane component of desmosomes,' confirming surface localization at cell-cell junctions. Disease mutations cause epithelial adhesion defects (hypotrichosis, monilethrix), consistent with keratinocyte-desmosomal dysfunction.
